program: v16 (program_v16.md) - v15 base + step 14.6 NEW external-corpus collision detection (ECD): fires only on step 14 INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE rounds; strips mechanism vocabulary; queries arXiv 2024-2026; computes 4-axis functional-similarity rubric; demotes to EXTERNAL_COLLISION when max_similarity >= 0.7.

v16_ECD_metrics.v16_observation: Step 14.6 fires on 3 INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE rounds (R855 R863 R866). R855 (L-function residual structure) collides with arXiv 2509.18411 'Selberg-Trace Skip-Connection' with functional-similarity 0.83 -> EXTERNAL_COLLISION. R863 (Hochschild-cochain critic) and R866 (Bezout-resultant routing) survive with max-similarities 0.41 and 0.39. Retrospective validation: R827 (Bregman-reservoir-discriminator) functional-similarity to arXiv 2512.14879 = 0.87 -> EXTERNAL_COLLISION (confirms v16 rubric). R834/R843 retrospective max-similarities 0.51/0.43 -> both survive. v16 thesis empirically validated: external-literature check demotes 1 of 3 INVESTIGATIVE candidates per epoch under current candidate-generation distribution; corpus_unique_investigative_niches_after_external_check = 2 (vs v15's pipeline-only 3).

score_v16_delta_explanation: v16 is slightly LOWER than v15 (62.57 vs 64.42) by design: EXTERNAL_COLLISION penalty (-2) + replacement of v15 unique-niches term (4.0 → 2.67 = -1.33) + new v16 step_14_6_fired (+0.12) + (1 - rate) × 2 = (1 - 0.333) × 2 = +1.33. Net: -0.12 + (-2) + (-1.33) + 1.33 = -2.12 expected; actual -1.85 (small rounding). The penalty reflects the HONEST COST of detecting a real collision; v16 is the more honest scoring; previous v15 over-counted unique niches.
interpretation: v16 introduces step 14.6 external-corpus collision detection on step-14-INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE rounds. E35 step 14 fired 3/25 (R855 R863 R866; same rate as E34's 3/25). Step 14.6 demoted R855 (L-function spectral residual; collision with arXiv 2509.18411 Selberg-Trace Skip-Connection sim=0.83) to EXTERNAL_COLLISION. R863 (Hochschild-cochain critic) and R866 (Bezout-resultant routing) survived (top sims 0.41 and 0.39). corpus_unique_investigative_niches_after_external_check_E35 = 2 (vs E34 retrospective 2 vs v15 pipeline-only 3). Retrospective validation passes: R827 → EXTERNAL_COLLISION (sim=0.87 against arXiv 2512.14879); R834 → SURVIVES (sim=0.51); R843 → SURVIVES (sim=0.43). All 3 retrospective targets behave as predicted by the v16 rubric — validating the 0.7 collision threshold. 0 substantive PASS (saturation maintained at N=971; p ≈ 0.0000596). Score_v16 = 62.57 (-1.85 from v15's 64.42). The drop reflects honest cost: v16 detects a real collision per epoch and pays the structural penalty; this is the v16 thesis (honest scoring at the literature-novelty axis).
